name: obsidian-latex-reference
description: An Obsidian.md plugin that provides a powerful indexing & referencing system for theorems & equations in your vault. Bring LaTeX-like workflow into Obsidian with theorem environments, automatic equation numbering, and more.

scripts.build: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:styles
scripts.build:check: npm run build:compile && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:styles
scripts.build:analyze: cross-env NODE_ENV=production ANALYZE=1 node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:compiled && npm run clean:modules && npm run clean:build
scripts.quality:all: npm run quality:lint && npm run quality:types && npm run quality:format && npm run quality:spell && npm run quality:test
scripts.verify: npm run fresh-install && npm run quality:all && npm run build
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json manifest.json versions.json
scripts.ci: npm run quality:all && npm run build

author: Ryota Ushio
